attacking_style: Launches decisive moves from breakaways on extreme gradient ramps (20%+), capable of sustaining solo efforts through technical finales of 6+ kilometers.
team_tactics: DSM transfer enabled greater tactical freedom to hunt secondary objectives; minimal direct team support visible, operates opportunistically from early breakaway selections.
terrain_preference: Excels on punishingly steep short-pitch climbs (20%+ gradients) where power-to-weight advantages maximize; technical descents and undulating finales suit solo capabilities.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent definitive assessment, though reliance on breakaway success suggests vulnerability in direct GC contender confrontations on sustained climbs.
key_patterns: Targets KOM classification aggressively once stage win establishes points buffer (19-point lead secured)
Exploits breakaway dynamics, attacking from reduced groups rather than initiating original selection
Benefits from race chaos/incidents that eliminate chase threats during solo efforts
form_trajectory: positive: Stage win and commanding KOM lead early in Vuelta suggests strong condition and tactical execution post-DSM transfer
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14
